steps.title: Set up factoring by grouping
steps.content: To factor $7x^2 - 20x - 32 = 0$, find two numbers that multiply to $(7)(-32) = -224$ and add to $-20$. Testing factor pairs of 224: $-28$ and \$8$ work because $(-28)(8) = -224$ and $-28 + 8 = -20$.

steps.title: Rewrite and factor by grouping
steps.content:
Replace the $-20x$ term with $-28x + 8x$:
$$7x^2 - 28x + 8x - 32 = 0$$
Group and factor out common binomials:
$$7x(x - 4) + 8(x - 4) = 0$$
$$(7x + 8)(x - 4) = 0$$

steps.title: Solve each factor for the positive solution
